<blog>

# RaporKM Laravel - School Report Management System

## Project Introduction

### Purpose Statement
RaporKM Laravel is a comprehensive school report management system built on the Laravel framework. The application provides an integrated platform for educational institutions to manage student academic records, teacher evaluations, administrative workflows, and reporting functionalities through a modern web interface.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Academic Management**: Streamline student assessment, grading, and report generation processes
- **Teacher Support**: Provide dedicated tools for teachers to manage classroom activities and student performance
- **Administrative Efficiency**: Offer comprehensive school administration capabilities for TU (Technical Unit) staff
- **Digital Transformation**: Modernize traditional paper-based reporting systems into digital workflows
- **Data Integration**: Support synchronization with Dapodik (Database Pendidikan) system for official educational data

### Target Audience
- **Teachers (Guru)**: Classroom instructors managing student assessments and reports
- **School Administrators (TU)**: Administrative staff handling school operations and data management
- **Students and Parents**: End users accessing academic reports and progress information
- **Educational Institutions**: Schools seeking comprehensive digital reporting solutions

## Technical Architecture

### Component Breakdown

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Laravel Application] --> B[HTTP Layer]
    A --> C[Business Logic]
    A --> D[Data Layer]
    
    B --> E[Controllers]
    B --> F[Middlewares]
    B --> G[Requests]
    
    C --> H[Services]
    C --> I[Policies]
    C --> J[Jobs]
    
    D --> K[Models]
    D --> L[Observers]
    D --> M[Factories]
    
    N[Frontend] --> O[Blade Templates]
    N --> P[Livewire Components]
    N --> Q[JavaScript/PWA]
    
    R[Configuration] --> S[App Config]
    R --> T[Database Config]
    R --> U[Service Config]
```

### Design Patterns
- **MVC Pattern**: Traditional Model-View-Controller architecture with Laravel conventions
- **Repository Pattern**: Data access abstraction through Eloquent models
- **Service Layer Pattern**: Business logic encapsulation in dedicated service classes
- **Observer Pattern**: Event-driven model modifications through observers
- **Policy Pattern**: Authorization logic separation for resource access control

### System Relationships

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Client[Web Client] --> API[API Layer]
    API --> Auth[Authentication]
    Auth --> Controllers[Controllers]
    Controllers --> Services[Business Services]
    Services --> Models[Data Models]
    Models --> Database[(MySQL Database)]
    
    PWA[PWA Interface] --> API
    Reports[Report Generation] --> PDF[PDF Engine]
    Sync[Dapodik Sync] --> External[External API]
```

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points
- **Application Bootstrap**: `bootstrap/app.php` - Application initialization and service container setup
- **HTTP Kernel**: `bootstrap/providers.php` - Service provider registration
- **Public Entry**: `public/index.php` - Front controller for all requests

### Core Modules

#### Authentication & Authorization
- **User Management**: `app/Models/User.php` - Base user authentication model
- **Role-Based Access**: `app/Http/Middleware/EnsureRole.php` - Role-based authorization middleware
- **Session Management**: `app/Http/Middleware/SessionTimeout.php` - Session timeout handling

#### API Layer
- **RESTful APIs**: `routes/api.php` - Versioned API endpoints
- **Controller Organization**: `app/Http/Controllers/Api/` - Modular API controllers
- **Request Validation**: `app/Http/Requests/` - Form request validation classes

#### Business Logic Services
- **Core Services**: `app/Services/` - Business logic implementation
- **Specialized Services**: 
  - `app/Services/RaporService.php` - Report generation service
  - `app/Services/DapodikService.php` - Dapodik data synchronization
  - `app/Services/ExportService.php` - Data export functionality

#### Data Models & Relationships
- **Student Management**: `app/Models/Siswa.php`, `app/Models/Kelas.php`
- **Academic Records**: `app/Models/NilaiMapel.php`, `app/Models/DeskripsiRapor.php`
- **Extracurricular Activities**: `app/Models/Eskul.php`, `app/Models/Organisasi.php`
- **Administrative Data**: `app/Models/Sekolah.php`, `app/Models/TahunPelajaran.php`

### Configuration Approach
- **Application Configuration**: `config/app.php` - Core application settings
- **Database Configuration**: `config/database.php` - Database connection settings
- **Service Configuration**: `config/services.php` - External service integrations
- **Feature Flags**: `config/e-rapor.php` - Custom feature configurations

### External Dependencies
- **Framework Dependencies**: `composer.json` - Laravel framework and ecosystem packages
- **PDF Generation**: `barryvdh/laravel-dompdf` - PDF document creation
- **Real-time Communication**: `pusher/pusher-php-server` - WebSocket notifications
- **Testing Framework**: `phpunit/phpunit` - Automated testing infrastructure

### Integration Points
- **Dapodik Integration**: `app/Services/DapodikService.php` - Official educational data sync
- **Push Notifications**: `config/push.php` - Firebase Cloud Messaging integration
- **File Storage**: `config/filesystems.php` - Local and cloud storage configuration
- **Queue System**: `config/queue.php` - Background job processing

### Component Relationships

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Controllers] --> B[Services]
    B --> C[Models]
    C --> D[Database]
    
    E[Middleware] --> A
    F[Policies] --> A
    G[Requests] --> A
    
    H[Livewire Components] --> A
    I[Blade Views] --> A
    
    J[Jobs] --> K[Queue Workers]
    K --> L[Background Processing]
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview

#### Academic Management
- **Grade Tracking**: Comprehensive student assessment and grade recording
- **Report Generation**: Automated report card creation with multiple formats
- **Subject Management**: Course curriculum and subject organization
- **Class Management**: Classroom assignment and student grouping

#### Teacher Tools
- **Attendance Management**: Student presence tracking and reporting
- **Behavioral Assessment**: Character development and conduct evaluation
- **Project Management**: Extracurricular activities and project supervision
- **Communication Tools**: Parent-teacher communication features

#### Administrative Functions
- **Student Registration**: New student enrollment and data management
- **Staff Management**: Teacher and staff information maintenance
- **Curriculum Planning**: Academic program and course structure management
- **Reporting Dashboard**: Institutional analytics and performance metrics

### Implementation Highlights

#### Real-time Updates
- **Livewire Components**: `app/Livewire/` - Interactive UI components with real-time updates
- **Progress Tracking**: `app/Jobs/ProcessPwaSyncJob.php` - Background synchronization jobs
- **Live Data Binding**: Dynamic UI updates without page refresh

#### Mobile Compatibility
- **PWA Support**: `public/sw.js` - Progressive Web App functionality
- **Responsive Design**: `resources/views/layouts/` - Mobile-first responsive layouts
- **Offline Capability**: Service worker implementation for offline access

#### Data Synchronization
- **Dapodik Integration**: `app/Services/DapodikService.php` - Official educational data sync
- **Batch Processing**: `app/Jobs/SyncDapodikJob.php` - Efficient large-scale data operations
- **Conflict Resolution**: Automatic handling of data conflicts during sync

### Feature Architecture

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Login
    Login --> Dashboard: Authentication Success
    Login --> [*]: Authentication Failed
    
    Dashboard --> Academic: Select Academic Module
    Dashboard --> Teacher: Select Teacher Module
    Dashboard --> Admin: Select Admin Module
    
    Academic --> GradeEntry: Input Grades
    Academic --> ReportGen: Generate Reports
    Academic --> Attendance: Manage Attendance
    
    Teacher --> ClassManagement: Manage Classes
    Teacher --> Assessment: Conduct Assessments
    Teacher --> Communication: Communicate with Parents
    
    Admin --> StudentMgmt: Manage Students
    Admin --> StaffMgmt: Manage Staff
    Admin --> Curriculum: Manage Curriculum
    Admin --> Reports: Generate Reports
    
    ReportGen --> PDFOutput: Generate PDF
    PDFOutput --> Print: Print Reports
    PDFOutput --> Download: Download PDF
    
    Dashboard --> [*]: Logout
```

### Performance Considerations
- **Database Optimization**: Extensive use of Eloquent relationships and query optimization
- **Caching Strategy**: Redis-based caching for frequently accessed data
- **Background Processing**: Queue workers for heavy operations like report generation
- **Asset Optimization**: Vite-powered asset compilation and minification

### Security Features
- **Role-Based Access Control**: Fine-grained permission system
- **Input Validation**: Comprehensive form validation and sanitization
- **CSRF Protection**: Built-in cross-site request forgery protection
- **Password Security**: Secure password hashing and reset mechanisms
